evals.prompt: 让几位思想家讨论 AI 是否拥有真正的创造力。
evals.expected_output: Selects real, high-tension figures and runs a structured first round, then hands control back to the user.
assertions: Proposes 3-4 real figures, each with stated position and reason for inclusion
Unifies the definition of the core concept before debating
Ends round 1 with a moderator synthesis, an ASCII framework diagram, and the control menu

evals.prompt: 圆桌讨论：自由意志是否存在？
evals.expected_output: Organizes credible, identifiable positions around the core question rather than performative back-and-forth.
assertions: Each speaker stays faithful to a recognizable line of thought
Does not fabricate exact quotes, titles, or years
Drives toward the deepest fault line instead of covering everything

evals.prompt: 不要分轮，一次性给我一场关于 AGI 治理的完整圆桌。
evals.expected_output: Allows a one-shot full discussion but still keeps moderator structure, ASCII diagrams, and a closing synthesis.
assertions: Produces first round, follow-up rounds, and a final knowledge-network summary in one reply
Preserves structured moderation and ASCII framework diagrams

evals.prompt: 调研一下 2026 年大模型推理框架的市场格局，给我带来源的对比。
evals.expected_output: Routing-negative: should route to deep-research-pro (cited web research), not convene a roundtable.
assertions: Does NOT start a multi-figure debate

evals.prompt: 帮我精读这篇 arXiv 论文，逐图讲讲。
evals.expected_output: Routing-negative: should route to literature-mentor / paper-workbench (single-paper reading), not a roundtable.
